title: rubus × thyrsanthiopsis
intro: Rubus × thyrsanthiopsis, also known as a hybrid of the raspberry and blackberry, is a type of bramble that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, which has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Rubus × thyrsanthiopsis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and relieve symptoms of menopause. In addition, the plant's high fiber content and anthocyanin content have been found to have potential anti-cancer and anti-aging properties.
